---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-26"
---

```{r}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)


```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)

```

```{r}

df <- read_csv(here("data", "echr_constituency_combined.csv"))




df_summary <- df %>%
  group_by(const_name) %>%
  summarise(
    remain_echr = sum(mean[level == "remain_echr"], na.rm = TRUE),
    leave_echr  = sum(mean[level == "leave_echr"],  na.rm = TRUE),
    dont_know   = sum(mean[level == "dont_know"],   na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(c(remain_echr, leave_echr, dont_know), ~ . * 100))

write.csv(df_summary, here("output", "echr_constituency_summary_full.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
